free_text: A 51 mg/cm**2 Pb-208 target was used.
Analyzing power for the inclusive quasifree (p,p)
reaction on Pb-208 at 290 MeV are presented.
- by compiler - some experimental data are not shown on
the figures.  These data are presented as DATA-MIN.
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrections in all Subents. EN-SEC, ERR-ANALYS deleted.
SD: SF5=ICL and SF7=P/RSD added; SF9=EXP
deleted from REACTION code. Data from Subents 003-007
